notes:
v1.3.1 — Minor Fixes & Enhancements

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed toggle/switch component — dot no longer escapes track
- Fixed light mode not applying globally across all pages
- Fixed navigation customization not reflecting on navbar
- Fixed display settings (image quality, adult content) now functional
- Fixed keyboard shortcuts (G then H/M/S etc.)
- Fixed external links not opening in Tauri desktop app

### Enhancements
- Customizable keyboard shortcuts with conflict detection
- Developer profile page with social links
- Enhanced About page with tech badges
- Image quality controls TMDB poster resolution
- Adult content filter passes to TMDB API
